title: Savory Creamy Ethiopian Yacon Salad
description: A low-calorie-friendly indulgent ethiopian dish featuring salty, creamy textures with a touch of sweetness from caramelized yacon and the warm spiciness of ground cardamom.

ingredients.name: 1 medium ripe yacon
ingredients.notes: Can be found in refrigerated sections of grocery stores or health food stores

instructions: Prepare yacon by slicing it into thin rounds and lightly coating them with a bit of olive oil.
Place the slices on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Roast in the preheated oven for about 20-25 minutes, flipping halfway through until they are slightly caramelized and golden brown.
While the yacon is roasting, mix together heavy cream, honey, minced garlic, ground cardamom, and salt in a bowl until well combined. Stir in the roasted yacon slices.
Serve immediately to enjoy its creamy, indulgent texture with a salty kick from the toasted yacon.
